heading: Application
label: 30502 Application
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3050246 App.:188.R.S. § 4289; (related to R.S. § 4289), ; , ; , .Feb. 18, 1875, ch. 80, § 118 Stat. 320June 19, 1886, ch. 421, § 424 Stat. 80June 5, 1936, ch. 521, § 449 Stat. 1481

Amendments2022— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “Except as otherwise provided, this chapter (except section 30503) applies to seagoing vessels and vessels used on lakes or rivers or in inland navigation, including canal boats, barges, and lighters.”Pub. L. 117–263

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as otherwise provided, this chapter (except section 30521) applies to seagoing vessels and vessels used on lakes or rivers or in inland navigation, including canal boats, barges, and lighters.

children.heading: .—Exception
children.label: b .—Exception
children.text: This chapter (except for section 30526) shall not apply to covered small passenger vessels.
